mapper.select: SELECT v.`id`, v.`collectible_id`, v.`title`, v.`sub_title`, v.`rules`, v.`pay_value`, v.`actual_value`, v.`type`, sv.`stock` , sv.begin_time , sv.end_time FROM tb_release_item v LEFT JOIN tb_flash_sale_item sv ON v.id = sv.release_item_id WHERE v.collectible_id = #{collectibleId} AND v.status = 1
